case_title: LIBERMAN, IRENE M. DBA THE MONROE vs. RANDLE, MANUEL AN INDIVIDUAL

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIBERMAN, IRENE M. DBA THE MONROE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-22-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-29-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RANDLE, MANUEL AN INDIVIDUAL
JUDGE LITTLE, SSAWYER, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD, PLTF, TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANDLE, MANUEL AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1870 SACRAMENTO STREET, ROOM 307, S.F. $500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. EXECUTION OF THE WRIT WAS STAYED TILL 5PM 10/6/97.
